g.text: atlas frames are grouped into named clips, then a timeline advances the active clip over delta time
every cell is a named frame:
atlas rect { x, y, w, h }.
it has no notion of clips,
named clips reference frames by name
each step = 1000 / fps ms (12 fps -> 83 ms)
loop: false -> holds last frame, fires onComplete
onFrame(i) fires on every frame advance
